metadata.description: Complete prebiotic selection and dosing rules. Combines per-mix prebiotic requirements, CFU-based dosing, sensitivity clamps, and contradiction override logic.

50B_mix8.note: Mix 8 HIGH LOAD strategy for aggressive Fiber guild expansion

prebiotic_threshold_warning.action: RAISE WARNING: Extremely high fiber load — Review clinical necessity
prebiotic_threshold_warning.historical_precedent: Batch 001 includes 9.5g load — used successfully. ≥10g requires heightened scrutiny.

gas_bloating_ibs_d_fodmap.note: MUST keep trace GOS (0.5g), FOS (0.5g), and Inulin (0.5-1.0g) — these are must_include substrates for co-administered strains (NCFM fructan-degradation, Bl-05 Bifidogenic cross-feeding, saccharolytic diversity). Only replace BULK doses above minimum. The pipeline enforces must_include retention deterministically.

MUST keep trace GOS (0.5g), FOS (0.5g), and Inulin (0.5g) — these are must_include substrates for Bifido-selective enrichment and NCFM cross-feeding. Only replace BULK doses above minimum. The pipeline enforces must_include retention deterministically.

mix_3.note: GOS is must-include — L. acidophilus NCFM degrades oligofructose releasing fructose and producing lactate for butyrate producers. Dual plantarum strains (UALp-05 + 299v) need carbohydrate substrate across all fermentation niches.

gas_histamine_ibs_d_fodmap.note: Glucomannan optional for constipation/weight. Keep minimal inulin/FOS for NCFM fructan-degradation signalling.

gas_sibo_fodmap_ibs_d.note: When SIBO suspected, can temporarily avoid all FOS/GOS/inulin completely and run PHGG-dominant

mix_5.note: GOS and HMOs are strongly preferred substrates — the v2 mix is Bifido-heavy (BB-12, HN019, 35624, BR03+B632) and these oligosaccharides are their primary fermentation substrates. Mucin-derived sugars (N-acetylglucosamine, fucose, sialic acid) from HMOs directly support the barrier-protective niche.

gas_fodmap_ibs_d_histamine.note: Safflower fiber is gentle, skin/barrier-oriented, less FODMAP-like

mix_6.note: v2 is a 6-strain mix (Novonesis + IFF + Probiotical). S. thermophilus UASt-09 operates in the small intestine — lactose and dietary fiber adequate substrate; heavy prebiotic loading not required for maintenance.

any_gi_sensitivity_fodmap.note: Keep minimal FOS for Akkermansia/Bifido signalling

mix_7.note: Resistant starch particularly important for L. fermentum LF16 (GABA production). Tryptophan-containing foods (dietary) support the 5-HT serotonin precursor pathway alongside LP815 GABA production — advise dietary tryptophan sources (turkey, eggs, legumes) in addition to prebiotic sachet.

gas_fodmap_sibo_stress_sensitivity.note: Keep tiny amounts of RS-like substrate via beta-glucans + PHGG to maintain GABA precursor environment

mix_8.strategy: HIGH LOAD — complex polysaccharides that Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes excel at but Akkermansia doesn't preferentially use

condition_specific_additions.description: Optional layers that can be added on top of core prebiotic pairing, within total gram budget
condition_specific_additions.integration_rule: Condition-specific additions must fit within CFU-based total gram range, clamped by sensitivity band. Core + additions = one total prebiotic load.

polyphenol_antimicrobial_thresholds.description: Doses above these ranges have documented antimicrobial activity — use supplement doses below these

quercetin.note: New nutritionist-confirmed dose 300-500mg is at lower bound of antimicrobial range. 300-400mg is safe for microbiome modulation; avoid >500mg.
